design_philosophy: Motion-first, high-end, moody, cinematic storytelling. The site must feel expensive, artisanal, and worth the wait.

typography.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#FDFBF7]
typography.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#C9A84C]
typography.overline: text-xs sm:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-[#C9A84C]

motion_and_interactions.parallax_scrolling: Use Framer Motion's useScroll and useTransform for smooth y-axis translations on background elements and floating cookie images.
motion_and_interactions.hover_menu_items: On hover, images must subtly zoom (scale 1.05) and brighten (filter: brightness 1.15). Transitions should be smooth (duration-500 ease-out).
motion_and_interactions.buttons: Gold buttons should have a soft glow on hover and scale slightly (scale 0.98 on tap).
motion_and_interactions.staggered_entrances: List items and grid cards should fade and slide up sequentially on scroll.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.style: Fixed top, glassmorphism (bg-[#0A140E]/80 backdrop-blur-md), minimal links, 'Order Now' CTA in Gold.

sections.name: Hero
sections.style: Full height (h-screen). Background video loop of gooey chocolate cookies in slow motion (absolute inset-0, object-cover). Dark overlay (bg-[#0A140E]/60). Center aligned text: 'Sundays' (H1) and 'The 24-Hour Cookie' (Overline).

sections.name: The Process
sections.style: Scrollable timeline. 4 steps: Browning → Mixing → 24hr Chilling → Baking. As user scrolls, text stays sticky while parallax images of the process slide in from the side or bottom.

sections.name: The Shop
sections.style: Showcase of 3 large flavor cards (e.g., The OG, The Minis, Rich & Reckless). Dark green surface cards. Image takes up 60% of card, title and description below. 'Order on WhatsApp' button in solid Gold (#C9A84C) with dark text.

sections.name: Footer
sections.style: Massive typography, brand statement, rich dark spacing (py-32 bg-[#0A140E]).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use the provided color codes: #1C3A2A (Forest Night Green) for backgrounds and #C9A84C (Antique Gold) for accents.
Implement the Hero background video loop with a fallback image. Make sure the overlay bg-[#0A140E]/60 is used so text is legible.
For the Process timeline, use Framer Motion to create a sticky scrolling effect where images slide up with a parallax feel while text remains visible.
The 3 flavor cards in The Shop section must include a 'Order on WhatsApp' gold button.
All interactive elements (buttons, cards) must have the requested hover state: scale 1.05 and filter: brightness(1.15) for images.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements, e.g., 'data-testid="order-whatsapp-button"'.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use Playfair Display for headings and Manrope for body text via Google Fonts.
